mentions.note: Insider buying 150M shares at current levels; 22% growth attractive; competes with Amazon; needs 2 clean quarters of execution; blessed at $22 on weakness.
Worst performer on CFO firing after 5 months; advertising play struggling in AI world; CFO uncertainty adds risk; not worth owning.

Chronic underperformer; down 68% in 2026 YTD already worst performer on S&P 500 last year; CFO fired after only 5 months major red flag; struggling to adapt to AI era; Wall Street fears ad-tech middlemen obsolete as Meta handles own AI targeting; down another 17% this week; now 15x forward earnings vs. 62x last year.
Down 68% in 2025, worst S&P performer; programmatic advertising disrupted by AI, Amazon competition, management missteps on AI rollout; must find new role in AI era.
